title: quercus cortesii
intro: Quercus cortesii, also known as the Cortés oak or the golden oak, is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the white oak group in the Quercus genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus cortesii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Quercus cortesii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
